text: Hi, my name is Claire and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance, and we want to help you find a better rate. Just an example of finding you the right quote. May I ask, are you under the age of 80? >> Oh, yes. Yes, I'm 14 years old. >> Sorry, I didn't catch that. Just to confirm really quick, are you under the age of 80? >> Oh, my goodness, yes. Oh, Lord, yes, I'm only 14.
